chapter.label: Tale 52
chapter.title: A Saying Of Abba Elias The Solitary

paragraphs.text: A brother visited Abba Elias the solitary at ihe community of the cave of Abba Sabas and said to him: ‘Abba, give me 2 saying!’ The elder said to the brother: In the days of our fathers, three virtues were cherished: poverty, humility and continence.* Now monks are dominated by avarice, gluttony and audacity. Hold on to which of these you will’,
